title: Semantic Lab
objective: 在已有内容管线之上实现可解释的语义图谱实验区，让知识资产之间的关系可以被生成、检查和交互式浏览

tasks.title: Build semantic graph from content metadata
acceptance_criteria: Semantic graph contains nodes for notes, projects, decks and resume entities
Edges are generated from explicit metadata, tags, links or documented heuristics
Graph contract documents node and edge fields
tasks.notes: Embedding-based edges are optional and must have a deterministic fallback.

tasks.title: Add semantic graph validation
acceptance_criteria: Graph validation rejects duplicate node ids
Graph validation rejects edges pointing at missing nodes
Graph metadata includes generated_at and source summary
tasks.notes: Added contract-level graph validation for duplicate node ids, dangling edges, generated_at, source_summary consistency, node/edge types, self-edges, and edge weight bounds. Validation runs locally without network access.

tasks.title: Implement 2D graph browser MVP
acceptance_criteria: Graph page renders non-empty nodes and edges from semantic_graph.json
Users can inspect node title, type and linked source
Graph surface remains usable on desktop and mobile
tasks.notes: Start with a stable 2D view before considering Three.js.

tasks.title: Evaluate 3D graph feasibility
acceptance_criteria: Feasibility doc compares 2D, Three.js and WebGL options
Performance, accessibility and maintenance risks are recorded
Decision recommends whether 3D should enter a later sprint
tasks.notes: Decision recorded: do not implement production 3D in S04. Keep 2D as the primary graph browser; revisit 3D only as an opt-in experimental view after mobile pointer, deterministic layout, reduced-motion, fallback, and visual QA gates exist.

tasks.title: Define experimental input guardrails
acceptance_criteria: MediaPipe and WebGPU experiments have explicit opt-in criteria
Browser permission prompts and device access are documented as external-sensitive actions
Agent.md reflects the current lab boundary after this sprint
tasks.notes: MediaPipe and WebGPU should stay behind a documented decision gate.
